sentences.en: You can stay if you want.
sentences.r: Nǐ xiǎng liúxià jiù liúxià ba.
Nǐ néng bāng wǒ yíxià ma, bàituō.
Nǐ xiǎng zuò shénme jiù zuò shénme.
Nǐ xiǎng wèn shénme jiù wèn ba.
Tā zhèngmíng le zìjǐ shì duì de.
Nǐ xiǎng diǎn shénme jiù diǎn shénme.

sentences.en: It was raining when I went out.
sentences.r: Wǒ chūmén de shíhou zài xiàyǔ.

sentences.en: If you come, I'll wait for you.
sentences.r: Nǐ yàoshi lái, wǒ jiù děng nǐ.

sentences.en: When I get there, I'll call you.
sentences.r: Wǒ dào le jiù gěi nǐ dǎ diànhuà.

sentences.en: I don't have time for anything.
I don't want to do anything today.
sentences.r: Wǒ jīntiān shénme dōu bù xiǎng zuò.

sentences.en: I need to buy something to eat.
sentences.r: Wǒ děi mǎi diǎn chī de.

sentences.en: I study Spanish in the morning.
I'm going to make the food.
I want to buy food for today.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎng mǎi jīntiān de chī de.

sentences.en: How much is a coffee here?
sentences.r: Zhèr yì bēi kāfēi duōshao qián?

sentences.en: I study a little every day.

sentences.r: Wǒ gěi dàjiā zuò le fàn.

sentences.t: 你知道我手机在哪儿吗？
sentences.en: Do you know where my phone is?
sentences.r: Nǐ zhīdào wǒ shǒujī zài nǎr ma?

sentences.en: I'm going to order a coffee.
Are you ready to go out yet?
sentences.r: Nǐ zhǔnbèi hǎo chūmén le ma?

sentences.en: Would you like to go out tonight?

sentences.t: 你出门前应该吃点东西。
sentences.en: You should eat before you go out.
sentences.r: Nǐ chūmén qián yīnggāi chī diǎn dōngxi.

sentences.en: I don't know what's wrong with me.
sentences.r: Wǒ bù zhīdào wǒ shì zěnme le.

sentences.t: 我在这儿一个人都不认识。
sentences.r: Wǒ zài zhèr yí ge rén dōu bú rènshi.

sentences.t: 从今天早上就开始疼了。
sentences.r: Cóng jīntiān zǎoshang jiù kāishǐ téng le.

sentences.en: At night I go to bed.

sentences.r: Zhè tàng gōngjiāo qù shìzhōngxīn ma?

sentences.en: He always says the same thing.
sentences.r: Tā lǎoshi shuō yíyàng de huà.

sentences.t: 我也就只能说这么多了。
sentences.en: I can't tell you more than that.
sentences.r: Wǒ yě jiù zhǐ néng shuō zhème duō le.
Zhè cì nǐ néng fùqián ma?

sentences.en: I don't know what his name is.
sentences.r: Wǒ bù zhīdào tā jiào shénme.

sentences.en: I'll do it in a moment.
He was here a moment ago.

sentences.t: 我得跟你说一下，就一会儿。
sentences.en: I need to talk to you for a sec.
sentences.r: Wǒ děi gēn nǐ shuō yíxià, jiù yíhuìr.
Wǒ měi ge xīngqīyī dōu fànkùn.

sentences.en: You need money to buy that.
We're going to throw a party.

sentences.r: Wǒ cóng xīngqīyī jiù bìng le.

sentences.en: Today I want to eat something tasty.
sentences.r: Jīntiān wǒ xiǎng chī diǎn hǎochī de.

sentences.en: Are you going to come or not?

sentences.r: Wǒmen qù hē bēi kāfēi ba.

sentences.en: The weather is really nice today.
Do you know how to get to my place?
sentences.r: Nǐ zhīdào zěnme dào wǒ jiā ma?

sentences.en: He asked me where I live.
sentences.r: Tā wèn wǒ zhù zài nǎr.

sentences.en: I'm going to buy something else.
sentences.r: Wǒ qù mǎi diǎn bié de.

sentences.en: I did one good thing today.
sentences.r: Wǒ jīntiān zuò le jiàn hǎoshì.
Zhège duì wǒ lái shuō tài guì le.
Nǐ de gǒu jǐ suì le?

sentences.en: My sister is ten years old.

sentences.r: Wǒ xǐhuan dāi zài jiā lǐ.

sentences.en: I'm going to go out for a bit.
I want to stay a little longer.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎng zài duō dāi yíhuìr.
